title: Patrick A. Bolger, PhD
text: I am currently a Community Development Champion in the School of Psychology at the University of Nottingham in the United Kingdom. I work mostly with the team at Open Science Tools, Ltd. (the makers of the open-source software for psychological experiments PsychoPy, and its online sister, Pavlovia). I was hired through funding from an Essential Open Source Software for Science grant from the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, obtained by Professor Jonathan Peirce
